Implement the orders data table. You need to write up to three files:

1. **`apps/web/src/orders/types.ts`** — Order types (if needed)
2. **`apps/web/src/orders/columns.ts`** — column definitions factory

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const priceFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        { class: "inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium" },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = row.getValue("total") as number;
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, priceFormatter.format(amount));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = dateFormatter.format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    label: "Actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const order = row.original;
      return h("div", { class: "flex items-center gap-2" }, [
        h("button", 
          { class: "text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900", onClick: () => handlers.onView?.(order) }, 
          "View"),
        h("button", 
          { class: "text-sm text-red-600 hover:text-red-900", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel?.(order) }, 
          "Cancel"),
      ]);
    },
  },
];


// --- types.ts ---
export type OrderStatus = "pending" | "processing" | "shipped" | "delivered" | "cancelled";

export interface Order {
  id: string;
  customer: string;
  status: OrderStatus;
  items: number;
  total: number;
  date: string;
}

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView?: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel?: (order: Order) => void;
}

        },

];

}

// Status label mapping
const statusMap: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

  pending: "status-pending",

  shipped: "status-shipped",
  delivered: "status-delivered",
  cancelled: "status-cancelled",
};

// Currency formatter (USD)
const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US",
{
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

// Date formatter (medium style)
const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US",
{
  year: "numeric",
  month: "short",
  day: "numeric",
});

const statusCell = ({ row }: CellContext<Order, unknown>) => {
  const order = row.original as Order;
  return h("span", { class: statusClasses[order.status] }, statusMap[order.status]);
};

const totalCell = ({ row }: CellContext<Order, unknown>) => {
  const order = row.original as Order;
  return h("span", {}, currencyFormatter.format(order.total));
};

const dateCell = ({ row }: CellContext<Order, unknown>) => {
  const order = row.original as Order;
  return h("span", {}, dateFormatter.format(new Date(order.date)));
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",

    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: totalCell,
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: dateCell,
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }: CellContext<Order, unknown>) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",

          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: OrderColumnHandlers,

    id: "id",
    label: "Order",

      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as Order["status"];
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );

  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",

    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const total = Number(row.getValue("total") as number);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(total);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

// Map each order status to a human-readable label
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

// Map each order status to Tailwind CSS classes for the badge
const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

// Formatter for currency (USD)
const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

// Formatter for dates (medium style)
const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: OrderColumnHandlers,
): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const total = row.getValue("total") as number;
      return h("span", null, currencyFormatter.format(total));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const date = row.getValue("date") as string;
      return h("span", null, dateFormatter.format(new Date(date)));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

export type OrderStatus = "pending" | "processing" | "shipped" | "delivered" | "cancelled";

export interface Order {
  id: string;
  customer: string;
  status: OrderStatus;
  items: number;
  total: number;
  date: string;
}

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}
